source_rationale: KRT17 is a basal cytokeratin characteristic of aberrant basaloid cells in fibrotic lung disease
KRT8 is a simple epithelial keratin marking the aberrant transitional state of basaloid cells
MMP7 is a matrix metalloproteinase strongly associated with aberrant basaloid cells in pulmonary fibrosis
GDF15 is a stress-response cytokine upregulated in aberrant basaloid cells linked to fibrotic remodeling
CDH1 (E-cadherin) marks the epithelial identity of aberrant basaloid cells undergoing partial EMT
TACSTD2 (TROP2) is a cell surface glycoprotein enriched in aberrant basaloid cells in IPF lungs
SOX4 is a transcription factor associated with the transitional/progenitor state of aberrant basaloid cells
KRT7 is a simple epithelial keratin co-expressed with basal keratins in aberrant basaloid cells
FABP4 is a fatty acid binding protein and canonical marker of alveolar macrophages reflecting lipid metabolism
MARCO is a scavenger receptor specifically expressed on alveolar macrophages for pathogen clearance
MSR1 (CD204) is a macrophage scavenger receptor highly expressed in alveolar macrophages
PPARG is a transcription factor essential for alveolar macrophage differentiation and identity
APOC1 is an apolipoprotein highly expressed in alveolar macrophages reflecting their lipid handling function
C1QA is a complement component produced by alveolar macrophages involved in immune surveillance
C1QB is a complement subunit co-expressed with C1QA as a hallmark of tissue-resident macrophages
CCL18 is a chemokine preferentially secreted by alveolar macrophages in the lung
AGER (RAGE) is the canonical marker of alveolar type 1 cells, essential for gas exchange surface
EMP2 is an epithelial membrane protein highly enriched in AT1 cells of the alveolar epithelium
CAV1 (caveolin-1) is critical for AT1 cell caveolae formation and gas exchange function
HOPX is a transcription factor and established marker of terminally differentiated AT1 cells
NTM (neurotrimin) is specifically expressed in AT1 cells in the lung alveolar epithelium
NCKAP5 is enriched in AT1 cells and associated with their characteristic flat morphology
SFTPC (surfactant protein C) is the definitive canonical marker of alveolar type 2 cells
SFTPB (surfactant protein B) is essential for surfactant function and highly expressed in AT2 cells
SFTPA1 (surfactant protein A1) is a major surfactant component produced by AT2 cells
SFTPA2 (surfactant protein A2) is co-expressed with SFTPA1 as a canonical AT2 marker
NAPSA (napsin A) is an aspartyl protease involved in surfactant protein processing in AT2 cells
ABCA3 is a lipid transporter in lamellar bodies essential for surfactant packaging in AT2 cells
SFTPD (surfactant protein D) is a collectin produced by AT2 cells for innate immune defense
SLC34A2 is a phosphate transporter specifically expressed in AT2 cells for surfactant phospholipid synthesis
CD74 is the MHC class II invariant chain highly expressed in B cells for antigen presentation
BANK1 is a B cell-specific scaffold protein involved in BCR signaling
EBF1 is a transcription factor essential for B cell lineage commitment and development
TNFRSF13C (BAFF-R) is a B cell survival receptor and canonical B cell surface marker
ADAM28 is a metalloprotease preferentially expressed in B lymphocytes
BACH2 is a transcription factor critical for B cell maturation and class switch recombination
HLA-DRA is an MHC class II gene highly expressed in B cells as professional antigen-presenting cells
KRT17 is a canonical basal cell keratin in airway epithelium
S100A2 is a calcium-binding protein enriched in basal cells of stratified and pseudostratified epithelia
MIR205HG hosts miR-205, a well-known basal cell-specific microRNA in epithelial tissues
KRT15 is a basal cell keratin marking progenitor basal cells in the airway
KRT19 is an epithelial keratin expressed in basal cells of the airway epithelium
EYA2 is a transcriptional coactivator enriched in airway basal progenitor cells
DNAH12 is a dynein axonemal heavy chain essential for ciliary motility in ciliated cells
CFAP299 is a cilia and flagella associated protein specific to motile ciliated cells
RSPH1 is a radial spoke head protein required for ciliary motility, a canonical ciliated cell marker
CAPS (calcyphosine) is highly expressed in ciliated epithelial cells and associated with ciliogenesis
DNAH9 is an outer dynein arm heavy chain critical for ciliary beat in airway ciliated cells
HYDIN is a central pair protein essential for ciliary motility and a hallmark of ciliated cells

RFX3 is a transcription factor that regulates ciliogenesis genes in ciliated cells
CDHR3 is a cadherin-related protein localized to cilia of airway epithelial cells
S100A8 (calgranulin A) is a canonical marker of classical monocytes and inflammatory myeloid cells
S100A9 (calgranulin B) forms the S100A8/A9 complex (calprotectin), a hallmark of classical monocytes
VCAN (versican) is highly expressed in classical monocytes and involved in inflammatory responses
FCN1 (ficolin-1) is a pattern recognition molecule and established classical monocyte marker
S100A12 is a calcium-binding protein specifically expressed in classical monocytes and neutrophils
THBS1 (thrombospondin-1) is upregulated in classical monocytes during inflammatory activation
IL1R2 is a decoy receptor for IL-1 enriched in classical monocytes
SCGB3A2 is a secretoglobin and canonical marker of club cells in the distal airways
SCGB1A1 (CC10/CC16) is the definitive club cell marker and major secretory product
SCGB3A1 is a secretoglobin family member expressed in club cells of the airway
CYP2B7P reflects the xenobiotic metabolism function characteristic of club cells

WFDC2 (HE4) is a secretory protein expressed in club cells of the airway epithelium
WDFY4 is specifically expressed in cDC1s and required for cross-presentation of antigens

ZBTB46 is a transcription factor that specifically marks conventional dendritic cells including cDC1
HLA-DPB1 is an MHC class II gene highly expressed in cDC1 as professional antigen-presenting cells

CCL17 (TARC) is a chemokine specifically produced by cDC2 cells

KLRK1 (NKG2D) is an activating receptor on cytotoxic T cells for target cell recognition

CD1A is a canonical surface marker of Langerhans cells involved in lipid antigen presentation

TPSB2 (tryptase beta 2) is a canonical mast cell-specific serine protease
